series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the minister license application, ordination credentials, cancellation evidence from religious society or congregation, and supporting materials.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Electronic records be retained seventy-five (75) years. ; Paper: Paper records be retained seventy-five (75) years or, if scanned and checked completeness, can be destroyed. Supporting materials will be retained no longer of administrative value
